title: poa disjecta
intro: Poa disjecta, also known as Sandgrass, is a species of grass native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Poa disjecta include reducing swelling and inflammation, as well as treating wounds and skin irritations. Poa disjecta can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it can also be dried and made into a powder for topical applications.
